code:
import io
import string
import list

fn is_ws(_ b: Int) -> Bool
  b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
end

fn format_group(_ prefix: String, _ xs: List<Int>) -> String
  mut out = prefix
  mut first = true
  for v in xs
    if first
      out = "#{out}#{v}"
      first = false
    else
      out = "#{out} #{v}"
    end
  end
  out
end

fn classify(_ tok: String, _ evens: List<Int>, _ odds: List<Int>) -> List<Int>
  match string.parse_int(tok)
  when Some(v)
    if v % 2 == 0
      list.push(evens, v)
    else
      evens
    end
  when None
    evens
  end
end

fn classify_odd(_ tok: String, _ odds: List<Int>) -> List<Int>
  match string.parse_int(tok)
  when Some(v)
    if v % 2 == 0
      odds
    else
      list.push(odds, v)
    end
  when None
    odds
  end
end

let input = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(input)
mut evens: List<Int> = []
mut odds: List<Int> = []
mut tok = ""
mut i = 0
while i < n
  match string.byte_at(input, i)
  when Some(b)
    if is_ws(b)
      if not string.is_empty(tok)
        evens = classify(tok, evens, odds)
        odds = classify_odd(tok, odds)
        tok = ""
      end
    else
      tok = "#{tok}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
  i = i + 1
end
if not string.is_empty(tok)
  evens = classify(tok, evens, odds)
  odds = classify_odd(tok, odds)
end

println(format_group("evens=", evens))
println(format_group("odds=", odds))
